title: Software Engineer, AI Platform
description:
Harvey transforms legal and professional services through frontier agentic AI and enterprise-grade platforms. The company serves 1000+ customers across 60+ countries with strong product-market fit and investor backing.

The AI Platform team builds foundational infrastructure supporting all Harvey products. This includes the model layer and agent systems that determine work quality. Legal domain complexity — hundreds of pages per document, millions of files per matter, zero error tolerance — demands sophisticated AI solutions.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design platform-level abstractions enhancing all agentic products
- Own model integration, routing, and evaluation infrastructure
- Build evaluation frameworks enabling systematic AI quality improvement
- Partner with product, engineering, and design teams on cutting-edge features
- Evaluate and integrate emerging AI advancements and agentic systems

Representative Projects:
- Context Engineering & Agent Infrastructure: Platform-level systems for context management, session state, and memory
- Model Integration & Routing: Infrastructure enabling rapid foundation model onboarding and intelligent task routing
- Evaluation Infrastructure: Shared tooling frameworks for measuring and improving AI quality
- Shared Abstractions: SDKs, platform primitives, and developer tooling for feature shipping

Required Qualifications:
- 5+ years building backend systems; 1+ year AI/ML engineering focus
- Production experience with multi-model or multi-provider AI systems
- Understanding of context management, session state, or memory systems
- Track record building adopted internal platforms, SDKs, or shared infrastructure
- Strong judgment about design abstractions; pragmatic shipping approach
- Excitement about agentic AI and autonomous system reliability challenges
- Full ownership mentality; navigates ambiguity independently

Preferred Qualifications:
- Evaluation framework development experience
- Agent/function-calling architecture familiarity
- Legal or high-stakes professional services domain knowledge
- Early-stage or hyper-growth startup experience

Compensation: $220,000 - $300,000 with equity and bonus eligibility. Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage; 401(k) matching; flexible PTO.
